name: Potion Quaffer
additional_info: Drink potions 30% faster. Increases the effectiveness of Health Regeneration potions by 15%, Sanity Restoration and Ether Regeneration potions by 30%, and removes the -25% effectiveness Instant Health potions have.
desc: You're accustomed to drinking toxic fluids quickly. You'll get along famously with the other patrons at the tavern. Drinking potions slows less and grants superior regenerative effects to you.
